scripts.build:mobile: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=static next build && node fix-paths.js && node prepare-android.js && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:android-release: npm run build:mobile && node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease' : 'cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease'; execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.build:android-release:win: npm run build:mobile && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:win: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=static next build && node fix-paths.js && node prepare-android.js && npx cap sync android
scripts.bundle:ota: npm run build:mobile && npm run build:ota
